node.text: Jolene finished an electrical engineering project last week.

node.text: Jolene has a pendant that reminds her of her mother.

node.text: Jolene's mother passed away last year.

node.text: Jolene is a student who is working on a robotics project assigned by her engineering professor.

node.text: Jolene finds working on the robotics project like solving a puzzle and enjoys figuring out the best design and programming.

node.text: Jolene enjoys seeing the robot come together as she works on the project.

node.text: Initially, Jolene felt a mix of excitement and nervousness when she received the robotics project.

node.text: Jolene enjoys playing video games and particularly likes the game "Detroit" on the console.
Jolene has a partner with whom she plans to play console games.
